title: Error::check is pub in wolftpm but pub(crate) in wolftpm-tss — inconsistent surface
description: wolftpm::error::Error::check is pub, but wolftpm_tss::error::Error::check is pub(crate). The wolftpm version exposes a raw wolfTPM rc -> Result mapper that users don't need (they have no raw rc values to map; that's the library's job). Make it pub(crate) in both crates for consistency and to avoid unnecessary public API surface.
